name: Seqwater Operations (demo)
description: Genie space over the Seqwater AI Command Centre demo tables. Lets the AquaIQ Supervisor (or any approved user) ask quantitative questions about SEQ Water Grid storage, rainfall, asset risk, water quality, capital projects, and flood readiness scenarios. ALL DATA IS DEMO AND MUST NOT BE USED FOR ANY OPERATIONAL PURPOSE.
instructions: Every response must explicitly state that the underlying data is demo data.
Always cite the table(s) used. Prefer SELECT against the seqwater_demo schema verbatim — do not invent tables or columns.
Never recommend or authorise an operational decision (releases, restrictions, boil-water notices, restarts, transfers).
Never invent numerical thresholds, regulatory limits, or public-health advice. Use only the values present in the tables.
Always note that any conclusion requires qualified human validation.
When asked for trends, default to the last 7 days unless the user specifies a different window.
When asked for top-N, default to N=5 unless the user specifies a different number.
sample_questions: Which assets are in the High or Critical risk band today?
Show the 7-day storage trend for North Pine Dam vs Wivenhoe Dam.
What is the 72-hour rainfall forecast averaged across all catchments?
Which water quality samples breached their turbidity envelope in the last 30 days?
What is the top 5 capital projects by risk reduction score?
Which treatment plants are running above 80% utilisation today?
How many open work orders are there per asset?
What is the demand vs treatment capacity headroom over the next 7 days?
Which flood scenarios have release_required = true?
Show asset health index trend for PMP-014 over the last 14 days.
What is the mean rainfall observed in the Pine Rivers catchment over the last 7 days?
Which assets have the highest predicted_failure_30d?

certified_queries.name: top_asset_risks
certified_queries.description: Top assets by risk_score, with risk band and recommended action.
certified_queries.sql: SELECT asset_name, asset_type, criticality, risk_score, risk_band, predicted_failure_30d, open_work_orders, recommended_action FROM {catalog}.{schema}.asset_risk_scores ORDER BY risk_score DESC LIMIT 10

certified_queries.name: storage_trend_7d
certified_queries.sql: SELECT asset_name, date, storage_percent FROM {catalog}.{schema}.dam_storage_daily WHERE date >= current_date() - INTERVAL 7 DAYS ORDER BY asset_name, date

certified_queries.name: water_quality_breaches_30d
certified_queries.description: Water quality samples in the Watch or Elevated alert level over the last 30 days.
certified_queries.sql: SELECT asset_name, sample_zone, sampled_at, alert_level, turbidity_NTU, recommended_action FROM {catalog}.{schema}.water_quality_samples WHERE alert_level <> 'Normal' AND sampled_at >= current_timestamp() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS ORDER BY sampled_at DESC

certified_queries.name: capital_priorities
certified_queries.description: Top capital projects by risk reduction score.
certified_queries.sql: SELECT project_name, asset_name, project_type, estimated_cost_aud, risk_reduction_score, recommended_priority FROM {catalog}.{schema}.capital_projects ORDER BY risk_reduction_score DESC LIMIT 10

certified_queries.name: rainfall_72h_outlook
certified_queries.description: Mean 72-hour rainfall forecast across catchment regions.
certified_queries.sql: SELECT region, AVG(forecast_rainfall_mm) AS mean_72h_mm FROM {catalog}.{schema}.rainfall_forecast WHERE horizon_hours = 72 GROUP BY region ORDER BY mean_72h_mm DESC

certified_queries.name: flood_scenarios_active
certified_queries.description: Flood readiness scenarios that flag a release as required.
certified_queries.sql: SELECT scenario_id, scenario_name, current_storage_percent, projected_storage_percent, downstream_impact_score, status FROM {catalog}.{schema}.flood_scenarios WHERE release_required = TRUE ORDER BY downstream_impact_score DESC
